# arXiv endorsement request (cs.CV) — copy/paste

**To:** [Advisor / senior student who has published on arXiv in cs.CV or related]

**Subject:** Request for arXiv endorsement (cs.CV) — OVDeploy preprint

---

Dear [Name],

I am Yuechun Wang, a first-year Artificial Intelligence undergraduate at Huaqiao University.
I have an arXiv account but am not yet endorsed for **cs.CV**.

I would like to post a preprint:

**Title:** OVDeploy: Realistic Evaluation of Open-Vocabulary Detection under User Vocabulary Constraints

**One-sentence summary:** We propose an episodic deployment evaluation protocol (EpisodicAP + OOV-FP) showing that federated LVIS AP (22.7) hides severe out-of-vocabulary leakage under small user vocabularies (e.g., ~66% OOV-FP at |V|=10), with B5 subset-prompt improving aggregate EpisodicAP (24.8 vs 13.9), validated across a 24-backbone LVIS matrix and diagnostic ODinW/DSP suites.

**Code:** https://github.com/wyc66-66/OVDeploy  
**Contact:** 341861408@qq.com  
**PDF (local):** `OVDeploy_preprint_en.pdf` / `submission-a/paper/advisor_build.pdf`

If you are willing to endorse me for **cs.CV**, arXiv will show an endorsement link after I begin the submission, or you can endorse via:

https://arxiv.org/auth/endorse

Thank you very much for your time.

Best regards,  
Yuechun Wang  
Huaqiao University  
341861408@qq.com

我是华侨大学人工智能专业王岳纯。arXiv 已有账号，但 **cs.CV 尚未 endorsement**。想挂预印本：

**OVDeploy**——开放词汇检测在用户词表约束下的部署评测协议（EpisodicAP + OOV-FP）。主数字：联邦 AP 22.7 看不见小词表泄漏；|V|=10 时 B0 OOV≈66%；B5 24.8 vs B0 13.9；24 骨干统一矩阵诚实填表。
